{{Relic Infobox|Byrdpip|2}}
{{R|Byrdpip||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Byrdonis Nest|2}} event. Upon pickup, it gives the card {{C|Byrd Swoop||2}}, and a cosmetic Byrdpip pet will accompany you in battles.

== Sources ==
* Can only be obtained by taking the {{C|Byrdonis Egg||2}} from the event {{E|Byrdonis Nest|2}} by selecting {{Frame|Take the Egg}} then hatching it a {{StS2|Rest Sites|Rest Site}}.

== Notes ==
* Removing the {{C|Byrd Swoop||2}} will not make the Byrdpip go away.
